function.name: age_group_performance
function.description: Return performance metrics for different age groups using user-facing display labels and thresholds derived from the configured feature adapter.

function.name: count_all
function.description: Count the number of data samples in the dataset. Can be used to count all data samples in the dataset and return the number.

function.name: show_ids
function.description: Show the IDs of all data samples in the dataset. Can be used to list IDs of all data samples in the dataset.

function.name: show_one
function.description: Show a data sample identified by an ID using user-facing labels and values.

patient_id.description: The id of the single data sample requested

function.name: confusion_matrix_stats
function.description: Return the confusion matrix for the model predictions, including true positives, false positives, etc.

function.name: counterfactual
function.description: Generate counterfactual examples for a patient that flip the prediction to a desired class, and present the suggested feature changes using user-facing labels and values.

patient_id.description: The ID of the patient to explain.

function.name: dataset_summary
function.description: Return a summary of the dataset using user-facing labels and values, including average or most common feature values and optionally a comparison with a specific patient's features.

patient_id.description: Optional. ID (row index) of the patient to compare to average values.

function.name: feature_importance_patient
function.description: Compute SHAP-based feature importance for a specific patient.

patient_id.description: Required ID of the patient to compute feature importance for.

function.name: feature_importance_global
function.description: Compute SHAP-based feature importance globally for the entire dataset.

function.name: feature_interactions
function.description: Return the top correlated feature pairs in the dataset.

function.name: get_model_description
function.description: Returns a general description of the model architecture and its purpose.

function.name: get_model_parameters
function.description: Returns the exact training hyperparameters of the model such as max_depth, criterion, and others.

function.name: misclassified_cases
function.description: Return statistics about misclassified samples and their common feature patterns using user-facing labels and values.

function.name: performance_metrics
function.description: Returns selected performance metrics such as model accuracy precision, recall, F1-score, and AUC-ROC. If no parameters are provided, returns all available metrics.

metrics.description: List of metrics to return. Available options: accuracy, precision, recall, f1_score, auc_roc.

function.name: predict
function.description: Predict the class and probability scores for a specific patient using their ID.

patient_id.description: The ID of the patient to predict.

function.name: what_if
function.description: Simulate how changing a continuous feature by a user-facing amount would affect the prediction for a patient.

patient_id.description: The ID of the patient to simulate.

feature.description: The name or alias of the continuous feature to modify.

value_change.description: The amount to add or subtract from the feature, using the feature's natural user-facing unit when available.
